phrases.intent_en: Ask where the visitor center is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el centro de visitantes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el SEN-troh deh bee-see-TAHN-tehs

likely_response.local: Junto a la Puerta de Hernani, entrada norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH ehr-NAH-nee ehnt-RAH-dah NOHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: It is near the Alcalá gate.

responses.english: It is near the Alcalá gate.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH ehr-NAH-nee ehnt-RAH-dah NOHR-teh
responses.local: Junto a la Puerta de Hernani, entrada norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which entrance is closest to Palacio de Cristal
phrases.text_local: ¿Qué entrada queda más cerca del Palacio?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿KEH en-TRAH-dah KEH-dah mahs KER-kah del pah-LAH-syoh?

likely_response.local: Puerta de O'Donnell, a cinco minutos.
likely_response.pronunciation: poo-EHR-tah DEH oh'-dohn-NEHY AH THEEN-koh mee-NOO-tohs

responses.phonetic: poo-EHR-tah DEH oh'-dohn-NEHY AH THEEN-koh mee-NOO-tohs
responses.local: Puerta de O'Donnell, a cinco minutos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Estanque Grande boat dock is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el embarcadero del Estanque Grande?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, DON-deh es-TAH el em-bar-kah-DEH-roh del es-TAN-keh GRAN-deh?

likely_response.local: Pase el Palacio de Cristal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAH-seh EHL pah-lah-THEE-oh DEH kree-STAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the main path towards the lake.

responses.english: Follow the main path towards the lake.
responses.phonetic: PAH-seh EHL pah-lah-THEE-oh DEH kree-STAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Pase el Palacio de Cristal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Palacio de Cristal entrance is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿por dónde se entra al Palacio de Cristal?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, por DOHN-deh seh EN-trah al pah-LAH-syoh deh KREE-stahl

likely_response.translation_en: The entrance is on the north side.

responses.english: The entrance is on the north side.
